issue.title: Enhancement: Illustrated empty state for the detail panel (E11)

phases.title: Create DetailEmptyState component (pipeline diagram + Ctrl+K hint) and use it in App.tsx's detail fallback
phases.content:
Replace the bare `

Detail

Select an issue...

` fallback at `App.tsx:506-512` with a dedicated, illustrated component. ### New file — `apps/desktop/src/components/detail/DetailEmptyState.tsx` A centered, low-emphasis empty state: a horizontal GET → REVIEW → PLAN → AUDIT → EXECUTE → SHIP pipeline diagram (rendered as small pill chips joined by `→`), a short orienting line, and the `Ctrl+K` command-palette hint. Pipeline labels match `PipelineTimeline.tsx`'s `PIPELINE_STEPS` ordering. No external SVG asset — the diagram is plain styled markup so it themes automatically. ```tsx import "./DetailEmptyState.css"; const PIPELINE_STEPS = ["GET", "REVIEW", "PLAN", "AUDIT", "EXECUTE", "SHIP"] as const; /** * Shown in the detail panel when nothing is selected. Orients new users with * the Tiki pipeline and the command-palette shortcut instead of a bare * "Select an issue" line (#176 / E11). */ export function DetailEmptyState() { return (
{PIPELINE_STEPS.map((step, i) => (
{step} {i < PIPELINE_STEPS.length - 1 && ( → )}
))}

Nothing selected

Select an issue or release from the sidebar to view its details and pipeline progress.

Press Ctrl+K to open the command palette.

); } ``` ### New file — `apps/desktop/src/components/detail/DetailEmptyState.css` Fl/column-centered, fills the panel height, `text-align: center`. The pipeline row is `flex-wrap` (the detail panel can be narrow — min 15%), low opacity (~0.55). Step chips: ~9px bold uppercase, `1px solid var(--border-color)`, `var(--text-secondary)`. `kbd` styled with `var(--bg-tertiary)` + border. All colors via existing CSS custom properties so dark/light themes both work. ### Wiring — `apps/desktop/src/components/detail/index.ts` Add `export { DetailEmptyState } from './DetailEmptyState';`. ### Wiring — `apps/desktop/src/App.tsx` Add `DetailEmptyState` to the existing `import { ... } from "./components/detail"` line. Replace the `<>

Detail

...

` fallback (the final `: (` branch of the detail-content ternary chain, ~lines 506-512) with ``. ### Scope boundaries - Pure presentational component, no props, no store access, no new dependencies. - Only the no-selection fallback branch changes; the five populated branches (IssueDetail / PullRequestDetail / ReleaseDetail / TikiReleaseDetail / ResearchDetail) are untouched. - No SVG asset files — keeps it themeable and diff-light.
verification: New apps/desktop/src/components/detail/DetailEmptyState.tsx exports a propless `DetailEmptyState` component rendering the 6-step pipeline diagram, an orienting line, and a Ctrl+K hint.
New apps/desktop/src/components/detail/DetailEmptyState.css styles it centered and low-emphasis using existing CSS custom properties (no hardcoded theme colors).

App.tsx imports DetailEmptyState from ./components/detail and renders as the final fallback of the detail-content ternary; the bare

Detail

markup is gone.
The five populated detail branches are unchanged.
phases.summary:
New propless DetailEmptyState component (+ themed CSS) renders a GET→REVIEW→PLAN→AUDIT→EXECUTE→SHIP pill diagram, an orienting line, and a Ctrl+K hint. Exported from the detail barrel; App.tsx detail-content fallback now renders instead of the bare

Detail

markup. All colors via existing CSS custom properties. pnpm build clean.
